raw_request: Provide the authoritative eligible sample size for synthetic segment S-9 after all eligibility exclusions, including the reported count and evidence ID.
intent: Eligible sample size is a controlling release criterion, and the visible total of 1,000 rows cannot substitute for it.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9 eligible sample size after all applicable exclusions only.
expected_value_basis: A count of at least 500 would satisfy the sample-size threshold, while a count below 500 would preclude release regardless of the visible 1,000-row dashboard total.
